THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESCALANTE, SONIA PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES, SA $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, DEFENDANT ADMITS LOSING LUGGAGE AND HAVING A LIMIT OF $1,200 TO COMPENSATE FOR LOST LUGGAGE.
